the-board.title: The Board
the-board.overviewHeading:
A Platform Where
AI Agents Debate
the-board.overviewBody: A web application where multiple AI agents discuss and make decisions in real time. From drafting business plans to critical review, it visualizes the process of AI autonomously collaborating.
leftItems: Multi-agent debate (Free / Pro / Enterprise)
God Mode: real-time control of discussion direction
Red Alert: emergency intervention system
Business Plan Wizard (11 questions × 5 categories)
Critical Review (Shadow Architect + Toxic Customer)
rightItems: Next.js Rewrite for API proxy integration
the-board.ctaHeading:
Experience the Arena
Where AI Debates

face-portfolio.title: Face Portfolio
face-portfolio.overviewHeading:
A Portfolio That Dazzles
With a 3D Character
face-portfolio.overviewBody: A portfolio site featuring a 3D character animation powered by Three.js as its main visual. The character changes with scrolling, delivering an interactive experience throughout the site.
leftItems: Scroll-linked 3D model switching (4 characters)
Up to 86% model size reduction via Draco compression
Emissive glow effect on hover and click
Two layouts: scroll-driven and panel-based
Works Admin with automated GitHub push
rightItems: Efficient model loading with GLTFLoader + DRACOLoader
Content management via Express API + GitHub REST API
face-portfolio.ctaHeading:
This Site Itself
Is the Portfolio

knowledge-nexus.title: Knowledge Nexus
knowledge-nexus.overviewBody: An AI knowledge management platform that uses Gemini AI to auto-analyze and summarize URLs and PDFs, accelerating knowledge retention through quiz generation, knowledge graphs, and a learning diary. Data is persisted in Supabase, with Google/GitHub OAuth for authentication.
leftItems: URL input → auto-fetch via Firecrawl API → summarize with Gemini AI
PDF management: upload, text extraction, AI analysis
Active learning: quiz generation, retry mode, teach-back mode
Brain (knowledge base): structured Markdown knowledge management with AI refactoring
Knowledge graph: visualize relationships and detect trends
rightItems: Gemini AI (structured output) for auto-structuring articles and PDFs
Firecrawl API for fetching JS-rendered pages

smart-checkin.title: Smart Check-in
smart-checkin.overviewHeading:
Self Check-in App
for Unstaffed Accommodations
smart-checkin.overviewBody: A web app that enables secure check-in without front desk staff, using WebAuthn biometric authentication and a Secret Code for two-factor verification. Administrators can manage reservations and issue guest registration URLs from a dashboard.
leftItems: Admin Dashboard: reservation creation, management, and Secret Code auto-generation
Guest Registration: occupant form input and passkey enrollment
Check-in: usernameless biometric auth + Secret Code verification
Smart lock PIN display after check-in completion
Automatic deletion of expired challenges (Vercel Cron)
smart-checkin.ctaHeading:
A Smarter Stay Experience
Through Biometric Auth

id-photo.title: ID Photo Studio
id-photo.overviewHeading:
Create ID Photos Easily
With AI
id-photo.overviewBody: A web app where uploading a photo lets Gemini AI handle background color changes, auto suit application, and trimming to various sizes. Supports major formats including passport, resume, and My Number Card, with L-size print sheet download.
leftItems: Background color change (white, blue, grey)
Suit application: AI automatically converts to business suit
Size presets (Passport / Resume / My Number / Driver's License / Visa)
Print sheet download (L-size, with cutting guides)
Drag & drop upload support
rightItems: Gemini 3 Pro Image Preview API for image generation and editing
Canvas API for L-size sheet composition and output
Image processing supporting WebP / PNG / JPG
id-photo.ctaHeading:
Eliminate ID Photo Retakes
With AI

sapuri-csv.title: サプリCSVセンター
sapuri-csv.tag: プライバシー / 人工知能
sapuri-csv.overviewHeading:
入会申込書データを
AIが自動抽出
sapuri-csv.overviewBody: PDF（マルチページ対応）や画像を一括で読み込み、AIがデータを抽出します。すべての処理を自社環境内で完結することで、個人情報を外部に送信しない安全な運用を実現します。
leftItems: 高精度AI抽出 (Local LLM)：複数ページPDF対応、1ページ＝1件として一括処理
一括アップロード：ドラッグ＆ドロップでフォルダ内の大量ファイルを解析キューへ
処理タイマー：解析時間を0.1秒単位で計測・表示
比較編集モード (Split View)：原本画像と入力フォームを左右に並べて確認・修正
ショートカットキー：Ctrl+Enter で保存、Esc でキャンセル
自動データ整形：電話番号フォーマット統一、和暦→西暦（YYYY/MM/DD）自動変換
入力バリデーション：必須項目（郵便番号等）未入力を赤枠で警告
誤操作防止：CLEARボタン2回クリック確認フロー
CSV/Excel出力：全31項目・2000行固定・BOM付きCSVでExcel文字化けなし
sapuri-csv.rightLabel: セキュリティとプライバシー
rightItems: 外部AIサービス・APIクラウド一切不使用
AI処理はローカルLLM（Ollama + llava）をローカル環境で実行
データの送信先：自マシン内のみ（インターネット通信なし）
氏名・住所・電話番号等の個人情報がローカルから外部に出ない
APIキー不要（外部サービス契約なし）
個人情報保護法への対応と情報漏洩リスクの排除を実現
sapuri-csv.ctaHeading:
地域業務をAIで
デジタル化する

sapuri-linebot.title: Sapuri LINE Bot
sapuri-linebot.mockLabel: RAG-powered LINE Bot for Local Currency
sapuri-linebot.overviewHeading:
AI Support LINE Bot
for Local Currency Merchants
sapuri-linebot.overviewBody: A LINE Bot that automatically answers inquiries from merchants of the Hiroo local currency 'Sapuri'. Combining a local LLM (Ollama) and a RAG system, it is designed to never send personal data to external servers, ensuring privacy and security.
leftItems: RAG system generates automated answers from manuals and FAQs
Local LLM (Ollama gemma2:2b) — no personal data sent externally
Personal information filter for double security
Real-time inquiry handling for merchants via LINE Messaging API
High-precision document retrieval via vector search
rightItems: Python async processing for optimized response speed
sapuri-linebot.ctaHeading:
Privacy-First AI
Powered by Local LLM

ai-agent.title: AI Agent × Agent
ai-agent.overviewHeading:
An Automation System
Where AI Agents Collaborate
ai-agent.overviewBody: A multi-agent collaboration system using CrewAI. Five agents — Researcher, Data Analyst, Writer, Critic, and Project Manager — work together to automate the full pipeline from research and analysis to writing and quality assurance.
leftItems: Researcher: information gathering (file reading, web search, scraping)
Data Analyst: data analysis and insight extraction (SWOT, trend forecasting)
Writer: content creation (blog, social media, reports)
Critic: quality assurance (fact-checking, SEO analysis, proofreading)
Project Manager: overall coordination (task optimization, progress management)
rightItems: Agent role definition and collaboration control via CrewAI
Execution modes: Sequential / Hierarchical / With Memory
High-precision text generation via Gemini API
Real-time information retrieval via Serper API (Google Search)
Parallel agent execution with Python async processing
ai-agent.ctaHeading:
Push Beyond the Limits
of Automation With Multi-Agent AI

freemarket.title: Coachtech Freemarket
freemarket.overviewHeading:
A Flea Market App
Built with PHP/Laravel
freemarket.overviewBody: A flea market app created as a learning project at the programming school CoachTech. It implements a full set of features found in a real e-commerce service, including product listings, Stripe payments, trade chat, and mutual reviews.
leftItems: User registration and login (Laravel Fortify, email verification)
Product listing: image upload, category and condition settings
Purchasing: Stripe payment, shipping address change
Trade chat: private post-purchase chat, unread notifications
Mutual review: 5-star rating + comments
rightItems: Secure member management with Laravel Fortify + email verification
Card payment and convenience store payment simulation via Stripe API
Transaction completion email notifications via Laravel Event/Listener
Production-like Docker environment with Nginx + PHP-FPM + MySQL
Local email send/receive testing with MailHog
freemarket.ctaHeading:
Implementing Practical
EC Features From Scratch

remotion.title: Remotion Video
remotion.overviewHeading:
Generate Video From Code
With React
remotion.overviewBody: A project that produces video as React components using Remotion. Animations, text, and audio are combined programmatically to achieve video expression through code.
leftItems: Define video structure with React components
Frame-level animation control
Voice synthesis integration template with VOICEVOX
Timeline management and asset compositing
MP4 export support
rightItems: Rendering job management via Node.js API
remotion.ctaHeading:
A New Experience of
Creating Video With Code

contact-form.title: Contact Form
contact-form.overviewHeading:
A Feature-Rich Contact Form
Built With Laravel
contact-form.overviewBody: A contact form application with user registration/login and admin search/management features. Built with a production-like environment using Docker, this work demonstrates Laravel's MVC architecture.
leftItems: User registration, login, and logout
Contact submission form
Admin: contact list, search, and detail view
Admin: user list and management features
Input validation (server-side and client-side)
contact-form.ctaHeading:
A Work That Solidified
Laravel Fundamentals
